hero.title: About Ceramica Masonry
hero.subtitle: Leading manufacturer of premium quality bricks with 25+ years of excellence in the construction materials industry

story.subtitle: OUR STORY
story.title: Building Excellence Since 1998
story.paragraph1: Founded in 1998, Ceramica Masonry has grown from a small local manufacturer to one of Vietnam's leading brick producers. Our journey has been marked by continuous innovation and unwavering commitment to quality.
story.paragraph2: With state-of-the-art production facilities and a team of experienced professionals, we produce millions of high-quality bricks annually, serving major construction projects across the country.
story.paragraph3: Our dedication to sustainable practices and environmental responsibility sets us apart in the industry, ensuring that every brick we produce meets the highest standards of quality and eco-friendliness.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Ceramica Masonry is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website and services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect the following types of information:

list.personal: Personal information: Name, email address, phone number
list.contact: Contact information: Shipping address, billing address
list.transaction: Transaction information: Order history, payment methods
list.technical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system

list.process: Process your orders and deliver products
list.improve: Improve our services and user experience
list.communicate: Communicate with you about orders and product updates
list.comply: Comply with legal obligations and regulations

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. Your data is encrypted and stored on secure servers.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

list.access: Right to access and receive a copy of your personal data
list.correct: Right to request correction of inaccurate information
list.delete: Right to request deletion of your personal data
list.restrict: Right to restrict processing of your personal data

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact:

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our services

intro.title: Acceptance of Terms
intro.content: By accessing and using the Ceramica Masonry website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website.

acceptance.title: Scope of Application
acceptance.content: These terms apply to all users of the website, including but not limited to visitors, customers, partners, and content providers.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Ceramica Masonry provides the following services:

list.products: Sale of high-quality construction brick products

obligations.title: User Obligations
obligations.content: When using our services, you agree to:

list.lawful: Use the service for lawful purposes only

list.illegal: Use the service for illegal purposes
list.infringe: Infringe on the intellectual property rights of any party
list.harm: Harm the system or other users
list.interfere: Interfere with the normal operation of the service

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Ceramica Masonry shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, unless required by law.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the website. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact:
